stages.name: Pool Layout
stages.description:
Final layout of the pool and spa. Illustration does not show the screen surrounding the pool.
This is different from what we first wanted, but functionality wise, this worked better for us.

stages.name: Pool Design
stages.description:
Picked out design pallet for pool and spa.
Deposit Due

stages.name: Move AC Unit
stages.description: Relocated the AC unit to make room for pool construction access.

stages.name: Cap Sprinkler Pipes
stages.description: Capped all sprinkler pipes in the pool construction zone to prevent damage during excavation.

stages.name: Locate Utilities
stages.description: Utility lines marked and located prior to any digging.

stages.name: Strip Sod
stages.description: Removed sod from the pool area in preparation for excavation.

stages.name: Excavation
stages.description:
Major excavation of the pool shell. Dirt hauled off site.
 First Draw Due

stages.name: LDS Layout, Dig, Steel, Install Silt Fence
stages.description: Layout completed, additional digging, steel rebar installed, and silt fence erected for erosion control.

stages.name: Inspection
stages.description: County inspection of steel and layout before gunite.

stages.name: Pre-Plumbing & Pre-Electric
stages.description: Underground plumbing and electrical conduit installed before inspection.

stages.name: Gunite
stages.description:
Gunite (shotcrete) sprayed to form the pool shell. The pool shape is now permanent.
 Second Draw Due

stages.name: Backfill
stages.description:
Backfilling around the pool shell with dirt and compaction. 
Backfill in pool construction refers to the process of filling the excavated area around a pool with soil or other materials after the pool is installed. This is essential for providing support, preventing moisture issues, and ensuring the stability of the pool structure.

stages.name: Fence Installation
stages.description: Installing fence around the backyard.  Not part of the pool process but we included it to surround the backyard.

stages.name: Rough Plumbing & Electric Day 1
stages.description: Above-ground rough plumbing lines and electrical wiring installed.

stages.name: Rough Plumbing & Electric Day 2
stages.description: Above-ground rough plumbing lines and electrical wiring installed.

stages.name: Pre-Grade
stages.description:
Initial grading around the pool area. 
Grading in pool construction refers to leveling and shaping the ground to create a stable base for the pool, preventing issues like cracking or sinking. Proper grading also ensures water drains away from the pool area to avoid erosion and drainage problems.

stages.name: Inspection
stages.description: Rough plumbing and electrical inspection.

stages.name: Deck Install
stages.description: Deck forms set and prepared for pouring.

stages.name: Pre-Electric
stages.description: Final pre-pour electrical runs and conduit placement.

stages.name: Bond Beam Installation
stages.description: Bond beam installed around the pool perimeter.

stages.name: Coping
stages.description:
Coping stones installed around the pool edge.
 Third Draw Due

stages.name: Termite Treatment
stages.description: Soil treated for termites beneath deck area.

stages.name: Deck Pour & Texture
stages.description: Concrete deck poured and textured finish applied.

stages.name: Equipment Delivery & Install
stages.description: Pool equipment (pump, filter, heater, salt system) delivered and installed.

stages.name: Screen Measure
stages.description: Screen enclosure measurements taken for fabrication.

stages.name: Interior Prep
stages.description: Pool interior prepped and cleaned for finish application.

stages.name: Install Screen
stages.description: Screen enclosure structure and panels installed.

stages.name: Door & Window Alarms
stages.description: Safety alarms installed on all pool access doors and windows per code.

stages.name: Inspection
stages.description: Screen and safety equipment inspection.

stages.name: Clean Out
stages.description: Full construction clean-out. Debris removed from site.

stages.name: Interior Finish, Installation & Acid Wash
stages.description: Interior plaster or pebble finish applied, then acid washed for prep.

stages.name: Final Grade
stages.description: Final landscaping grade and cleanup around the entire pool area.

stages.name: Final Inspection
stages.description: Final county inspection and certificate of completion.

stages.name: Finished
stages.description:
Final layout of the pool and spa.

Pool dimensions: 15 x 30 ft
Spa: 7 x 6 ft
Depth: 3 ft shallow — 5 ft deep end
